Class Regular

java.lang.Object
Regular
public class Regular extends Object
Constructor class for a Regular Vending Machine

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Regular()
    Creates a Regular vending Machine

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cancelTransaction()
    Cancels the transaction and returns inserted cash
    double
    checkCash()
    Checks the total value of the denominations inserted
    boolean
    checkChangeAvailability(double changeAmount)
    checks for change availability by simulating the transaction first
    Item
    dispenseItem(String name)
    dispenses the item chosen to be purchased by the user
    void
    displayInsert(Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows user control to insert denominations for purchase
    void
    displayItems()
    Displays items on the slots on the vending machine
    void
    displaySell(Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows user control to make a purchase Also handles the dispension of items and change
    void
    giveChange(double changeAmount)
    gives the change to the user after a successful transaction
    void
    manageCashStorage(Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows user to manage the cash vault and its contents
    void
    management(Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows user controls to the management features of the vending machine
    void
    manageSlot(int slotIndex, Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows the management of the selected slot
    void
    printSpecificSummary(int index, Scanner keyboard)
    prints a transaction summary with data from the last restocking/audit of the selected slot
    void
    printTransactionSummary(Scanner keyboard)
    Prints a transaction summary with data from the last audit
    void
    recieveCash(Denomination cash)
    Recieves a denomination from the user.
    void
    returnCash()
    Returns the cash inserted by the user back
    void
    selectSlot(Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows user to choose which slot to manage
    Slots
    slotFinder(String name)
    A helper method used to find a slot that contains a specific item
    void
    transferCashToStorage()
    transfers the cash recieved after a successful transaction to the vending machine's cash storage
    boolean
    validDenomination(double value)
    Checks if the denomination that is being inserted is to be accepted by the machine
    void
    vending(Scanner keyboard)
    Displays and allows user controls to the vending features of the vending machine

  • Constructor Details

    • Regular

      public Regular()
      Creates a Regular vending Machine

  • Method Details

    • vending

      public void vending(Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows user controls to the vending features of the vending machine
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • management

      public void management(Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows user controls to the management features of the vending machine
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • displayInsert

      public void displayInsert(Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows user control to insert denominations for purchase
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • displaySell

      public void displaySell(Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows user control to make a purchase Also handles the dispension of items and change
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • displayItems

      public void displayItems()
      Displays items on the slots on the vending machine

    • recieveCash

      public void recieveCash(Denomination cash)
      Recieves a denomination from the user.
      Parameters:
      cash - the denomination inserted by the user
      See Also:
      • class for denomination attributes

    • checkCash

      public double checkCash()
      Checks the total value of the denominations inserted

    • returnCash

      public void returnCash()
      Returns the cash inserted by the user back

    • transferCashToStorage

      public void transferCashToStorage()
      transfers the cash recieved after a successful transaction to the vending machine's cash storage

    • checkChangeAvailability

      public boolean checkChangeAvailability(double changeAmount)
      checks for change availability by simulating the transaction first
      Parameters:
      changeAmount - the change needed to be provided by the vending machine
      Returns:
      true if change is available, else false

    • giveChange

      public void giveChange(double changeAmount)
      gives the change to the user after a successful transaction
      Parameters:
      changeAmount - the change needed to be provided by the vending machine

    • dispenseItem

      public Item dispenseItem(String name)
      dispenses the item chosen to be purchased by the user
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the Item that is being purchased
      Returns:
      Item to be dispensed if item exists and has stock, else null

    • slotFinder

      public Slots slotFinder(String name)
      A helper method used to find a slot that contains a specific item
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the item used to search for its slot
      Returns:
      Slot that contains the item if it exists, else null

    • validDenomination

      public boolean validDenomination(double value)
      Checks if the denomination that is being inserted is to be accepted by the machine
      Parameters:
      value - the value of the denomination that the user is trying to insert
      Returns:
      true if valid, else false

    • cancelTransaction

      public void cancelTransaction()
      Cancels the transaction and returns inserted cash

    • selectSlot

      public void selectSlot(Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows user to choose which slot to manage
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • manageSlot

      public void manageSlot(int slotIndex, Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows the management of the selected slot
      Parameters:
      slotIndex - the index of the slot to be managed
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • manageCashStorage

      public void manageCashStorage(Scanner keyboard)
      Displays and allows user to manage the cash vault and its contents
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • printTransactionSummary

      public void printTransactionSummary(Scanner keyboard)
      Prints a transaction summary with data from the last audit
      Parameters:
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input

    • printSpecificSummary

      public void printSpecificSummary(int index, Scanner keyboard)
      prints a transaction summary with data from the last restocking/audit of the selected slot
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the selected slot
      keyboard - the scanner used to get input
